name: Yandex · SerpApi

env_keys.comment: Same SerpApi key for all engines; anysearch uses `engine="yandex"`.

requires_key.source_url: Set SERPAPI_API_KEY. Optional `engine` (e.g. bing, baidu, yandex) — supported web engines include: amazon, apple_app_store, baidu, bing, duckduckgo, ebay, google, naver, walmart, yahoo, yandex, yelp, youtube.
requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

domains.source_url: Set SERPAPI_API_KEY. Optional `engine` (e.g. bing, baidu, yandex) — supported web engines include: amazon, apple_app_store, baidu, bing, duckduckgo, ebay, google, naver, walmart, yahoo, yandex, yelp, youtube.

language.comment: Language via Yandex-specific params (see SerpApi docs).

answer.comment: Answer box when the engine JSON includes one (not explicitly requested).

news.comment: News via SerpApi where a dedicated news engine exists for this backend.

mode.source_url: Set SERPAPI_API_KEY. Optional `engine` (e.g. bing, baidu, yandex) — supported web engines include: amazon, apple_app_store, baidu, bing, duckduckgo, ebay, google, naver, walmart, yahoo, yandex, yelp, youtube.
mode.comment: Fixed SerpApi backend `engine=yandex` (set via anysearch `engine="yandex"` with `provider="serpapi"`). No separate fast/deep tier on this engine.

notes: SerpApi proxy to Yandex (`engine=yandex`). Native SDK package: google-search-results.
